title: rubia balearica
intro: Rubia balearica is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is also known as Balearic madder or Spanish madder. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubia balearica include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic, and it is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies.
